description: Detailed violation report produced by IntentGuard when a constitutional rule is violated (src/mind/governance/violation_report.py). Each ViolationReport describes one violated rule at one file path. ViolationReport instances are collected into ConstitutionalViolationError.violations and serialized via to_dict() into proposal.execution_results. The ConstitutionalViolationPayload (to_dict() envelope) has no Python class and is deferred — same gap as ProposalConsequence. ViolationLike (same file) is a Protocol for duck-typed consumers to avoid Mind-layer imports; it is not a dataclass and is not governable via the current AST gate. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.

rule_name.description: Rule identifier that was violated. Corresponds to rule_id in the Finding nucleus.

path.description: Repo-relative file path where the violation occurred.

severity.description: Violation severity. Values in live code: 'error', 'warning'.

suggested_fix.description: Optional remediation guidance. Default empty string.

source_policy.description: Policy file that declared the violated rule. Default 'unknown'.
